title: Founder's Associate (CEO Office)
source: Fuse Energy Workable (company ATS), resolved from BuiltIn London
requirements_met: Collaborate with leadership on strategy, finance, operations, product development: founder-facing generalist scope
Drive critical initiatives and support market evaluations: strategy + ops generalist
Thrive in fast-paced first-principles startup: ex-Minima founder-facing background
gaps: Finance-heavy scope (real-time power trading context) may favour quantitative background
preferred_met: Comfortable across strategy, ops and product simultaneously
Builder mindset in cutting-edge tech environment

experience_fit.calculation: Mid-level generalist fits CEO-office FA scope strongly

industry_match.calculation: Energy tech with AI/automation backbone - adjacent rather than pure AI product

location_match.calculation: London in-office; Ryan covers London (Cambridge commute friction)

salary_penalty.reason: Salary not listed; $170M-funded startup CEO-office role likely above GBP 50k floor

notes: Fuse Energy: renewable energy startup, raised $170M (Balderton, Accel, Lakestar, Lowercarbon). CEO Office FA spanning strategy, finance, ops, product, market evaluations. Confirmed active via Built In London.

must_haves.req: Bachelor's degree from a TOP university in STEM with coding or analytical experience
must_haves.note: Ryan holds a 2:1 BA Business Management from Leeds — non-top-tier, non-STEM, no formal coding; this is the first stated requirement and a hard credential gate

must_haves.req: Demonstrated track record of exceptional achievement
must_haves.note: $4.5m presale 15x ROI, 100k community, contributed to $6.5m Series A

must_haves.req: Break down complex problems and execute quickly; relentless, operational mindset
must_haves.note: First-employee operator turning ambiguous priorities into workstreams

must_haves.req: Analyse trading, supply economics, pricing/forecasting/business models
must_haves.note: Heavy quantitative/financial-modelling and energy-trading scope; Ryan's analytics are growth/funnel/community, not power-trading or financial modelling

must_haves.req: Learn fast, context-switch, work with limited guidance
must_haves.note: Self-directed across functions and self-taught AI agents

hard_blockers: Explicit 'top university in STEM with coding/analytical experience' degree gate — Ryan fails on tier, field, and coding
Quantitative energy-trading/financial-modelling scope favours an ex-quant/IB/consulting analytical profile, not a community-led GTM operator
interview_match.one_line_verdict: Two hard gates — top-tier STEM+coding degree and quant trading/modelling scope — make screen-out very likely despite strong operator instincts.
